info.name: Feed
info.description: Activity feed of recently-published question sets in the user's enrolled subjects.

request.description:
Recent published question sets in subjects the authenticated user is enrolled in. Excludes the user's own publications so the feed feels social. Drives the dashboard "Activity in your subjects" tile.

**Requires:** Bearer token

**Query params:**
- `page` — default 1
- `size` — default 20, max 100

**Returns:** `FeedListResponse` (200) — each item: `question_set_id`, `title`, `subject_id`, `subject_name`, `subject_code`, `author_id`, `author_name`, `question_count`, `published_at`.
